payload.answer: I couldn’t remember the article’s contents because the URL fetch failed with a 404 network error. I can only note that you wanted to remember this URL for memory architecture if you want, but I won’t infer any article claims without source content.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so no durable source claims can be created.

details: No memory cards created because article content was unavailable.

repair_options: Ask to save only the URL and your reason for wanting it remembered, without claims about article content.
